script: echo '=== Look up Axel Manosalvas ==='; az ad user list --filter "startswith(givenName,'Axel')" --query "[].{id:id, displayName:displayName, upn:userPrincipalName, mail:mail}" -o json 2>&1; echo; echo '=== Search by surname Manosalvas ==='; az ad user list --filter "startswith(surname,'Manosalvas')" --query "[].{id:id, displayName:displayName, upn:userPrincipalName, mail:mail}" -o json 2>&1
